variables.name: content_pool
variables.description: All notes keyed by note_id. Each note: note_id, title, desc, time (ms), user_id, nickname, ip_location, tags_list, comments (comment_id -> {comment_id, timestamp, user_id, nickname, content, parent_comment_id, at_count, ip_location, sub_comment_count}), comment_count, popularity (runtime).

variables.name: current_timestamp
variables.description: Simulation clock in milliseconds; advances each step with power/sigmoid-scheduled day slices.

variables.name: timestamp_duration
variables.description: Width of the next note window in ms (distance from current_timestamp covered by current_notes).

variables.name: simulation_start_timestamp
variables.description: Anchor time at load; used with max_span_days to cap timeline.

variables.name: current_step
variables.description: 1-based step counter updated after each SimEnv._save_step_data.

variables.name: current_notes
variables.description: Subset of content_pool with note.time < window_end; comments truncated (top sub_comment_count + random sample).

variables.name: mention_pool
variables.description: Nested user_id -> comment_id -> {note_id, comment_id, comment_content, mentioner_id, mentioner_nickname, mention_type (at|comment|reply)}.

variables.name: registered_user_agent_ids
variables.description: All UserAgent profile IDs; populated at init for metrics denominators.

variables.name: reference_embedding_path
variables.description: Path to precomputed note embeddings JSON for text_similarity metric.

variables.name: reference_csv_path
variables.description: Reference comments CSV (note_id, content) for text_max_reference_similarity metric.

variables.name: popularity_window_days
variables.description: Rolling window (days) for per-note popularity = comment count ending at current_timestamp.

variables.name: recommended_note_ids
variables.description: Flat list of note IDs already recommended to this user (legacy union).

variables.name: recommended_note_ids_by_channel
variables.description: source_type (algorithm|social|search|keep_following) -> step -> [note_id].

variables.name: mentioned_note_ids_by_channel
variables.description: mention_type (at|comment|reply) -> step -> [note_id].

variables.name: keep_following_note_ids
variables.description: At most one note ID to re-expose next round via KeepFollowingEvent.

variables.name: recommendations
variables.description: Transient recommendation payload on profile (schema compat).

variables.name: mentions
variables.description: Transient mention payload on profile (schema compat).

variables.name: last_login_timestamp
variables.description: Last social-feed scan time (ms); social feed uses [last_login, window_end).

variables.name: login
variables.description: Activation flag: 1 active, 0 inactive, -1 unset (set -1 each StartEvent).

variables.name: historical_notes
variables.description: Historical content IDs received.

variables.name: historical_summary
variables.description: Persona summary used in LLM prompts.

variables.name: type
variables.description: Random Recommendation | Hot Recommendation | Interest Recommendation | Relevant Search.

variables.name: current_notes
variables.description: Mirror of env current_notes updated on StartEvent.

variables.name: recommended_note_ids_by_user
variables.description: user_id -> list of note IDs ever pushed to that user.

variables.name: candidate_note_ids_by_user
variables.description: user_id -> candidate note IDs for interest recommendation.

variables.name: comment_count_dist_7d
variables.description: Hot recommendation: [{comment_count, post_count}, ...].

variables.name: comment_count_dist_7d_csv
variables.description: CSV fallback when comment_count_dist_7d is empty.

variables.name: random_rec_mau
variables.description: Random recommendation platform MAU.

variables.name: random_rec_avg_posts_per_user_month
variables.description: Random recommendation avg posts per user per month.

variables.name: recommendations
variables.description: Transient recommendation output (schema compat).
